title: Constrained surfaces expose bounded meaning and action
summary: Glanceable, live, and system-mediated surfaces prioritize identity, value, freshness, privacy, and direct handoff.
guidance: Define placeholder, current, stale, paused, ended, failed, and redacted states; keep consequential work in the full destination.
do: Deep-link to the exact entity or task
dont: Shrink an app screen into a widget or imply stale data is live
verification: surface lifecycle, privacy, localization, and deep-link matrix
